market.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a new Prime Minister takes office.
market.rules_primary: If the first new person to hold Prime Minister of Israel after Issuance is Yossi Cohen, then the market resolves to Yes.
market.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on who actually assumes the office of Prime Minister, not who is elected or nominated. Acting or interim appointments count as holding the position if they formally assume the office. The person must be different from whoever held the position at market issuance - if the same person continues in office through the expiration date, all markets resolve to No. Resolution is based on official announcements from the country's legislature or government, with The New York Times as a secondary source for confirmation.
market.title: Will Yossi Cohen be the next Prime Minister of Israel?
